final:
module fixed_priority_arbiter (
    input [4:0] req,
    output reg [4:0] obf_grant
);
    always @(*) begin
        obf_grant = 5'b00000; // Default no obf_grant
        if (req[0]) obf_grant = 5'b00001; // Grant for req[0]
        else if (req[1]) obf_grant = 5'b00010; // Grant for req[1]
        else if (req[2]) obf_grant = 5'b00100; // Grant for req[2]
        else if (req[3]) obf_grant = 5'b01000; // Grant for req[3]
        else if (req[4]) obf_grant = 5'b10000; // Grant for req[4]
    end
endmodule
